provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
BASIC SAFETY STANDARDS FOR IONISING RADIATION

[ L.S. 585.01

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 585.01
REGOLAMENTI DWAR BASIC SAFETY STANDARDS
FOR IONISING RADIATION
6 ta’ Frar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 210 tal-2018, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 184 tal2020 u 139 tal-2022 u bl-Att XXXIII tal-2024.

Dawn ir-regolamenti saru bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
